purpose: Flagship complex-task shortlist: work-order-style briefs (not job ads) for full pipeline: rewritten rich brief -> generated input assets -> multi-op Adobe connector processing -> composed final deliverables.

picks.why_strong: Coordinated 6-piece wedding signage suite with the most exact dimension specs in the whole DB (six trim sizes, px targets at 300dpi, bleeds, safe margins), two creative directions, and a 'coordinate with the existing signature-drinks sign' constraint.
picks.title: Wedding Signage for Print (high res, not AI generated)
picks.desc: Applicants, please share examples of similar work in your proposal. Hello! I love the attached signature drinks image I created and would like to keep that sign as is. However, the other signs do not coordinate well with it, and they are not high enough resolution for professional print quality. The current backgrounds were AI-generated, which limits the DPI and makes them risky for large-format printing. I’m looking to create a cohesive new family of signs in print-ready resolution. The attached seating chart and welcome sign drafts show the general sign types that need to be redesigned. Creative direction: Option 1: Continue with the soft floral theme. The flowers should be inspired by this arrangement: https://bifloralsilkflowers.com/producto/emma/arch-arrangement-6/ Option 2: Use a more elevated black script direction, similar to the attached example.jpg. Either way, I’d like the signs to feel like a coordinated family, while allowing the signature drinks sign to remain the more playful, personal piece. Files needed: 1. Welcome Gathering Sign Size: 20 in x 30 in Minimum resolution at 300 DPI: 6000 x 9000 pixels 2. Welcome Wedding Ceremony & Reception Sign Size: 35.4 in x 23.6 in Minimum resolution at 300 DPI: 10,620 x 7,080 pixels 3. Menu / Thank You Long Card 4 in × 9 in, portrait orientation, with 0.125 in bleed on all sides. Minimum export resolution should be 1200 × 2700 pixels at final trim size, 4. Seating Chart Size: 47.2 in x 35.4 in Minimum resolution at 300 DPI: 14,160 x 10,620 pixels (I'll provide the name lists soon) 5. Wedding Program Size: 5 x 7 folded, 10 x 7 flat Bleed: 0.125 in on all sides Safe margin: 0.25 in Resolution: 300 DPI minimum 6. Table signs for tables 1-6 5 x 7 inches Resolution: 300 DPI minimum Please provide the final files as print-ready PDFs, preferably with vector text and artwork where possible, plus editable source files. Please also include bleed if required by the printer, ideally 0.125 in to 0.25 in, and keep all important text safely inside the trim area. Thank you!
picks.task_type: Wedding Signage Family — welcome, seating chart, menu, program, table signs (print-ready)
picks.mcp_workflow: search_design (Express wedding signage templates: welcome / seating chart / menu / program / table number) -> fill_text (couple names, copy, menu, table assignments) -> asset_add_file (floral / black-script reference) -> image_crop_and_resize (each exact trim size) -> document_convert_pdf (print-ready PDF w/ bleed)
inputs: Welcome Gathering Sign 20x30in (6000x9000px @300dpi)
Welcome Ceremony & Reception Sign 35.4x23.6in (10620x7080px)
Menu / Thank You card 4x9in portrait, 0.125in bleed, min 1200x2700px
Seating Chart 47.2x35.4in (14160x10620px) — name list provided later
Wedding Program 5x7 folded / 10x7 flat, 0.125in bleed, 0.25in safe
Table signs tables 1-6, 5x7in, 300dpi
Direction: soft floral (ref URL) OR elevated black-script; keep existing signature-drinks sign untouched; print-ready PDFs w/ vector text + source files
picks.note: Express templates cover these sign types and fill_text sets all copy/names, but matching the exact floral/black-script look, hitting the large 300dpi pixel targets and true vector-text PDFs at trim with bleed need a human finish in Express/InDesign.

picks.why_strong: Two-sided DIN A5 package insert for a real German shaving retailer (Blausweta-Rasur): full campaign logic (SHOP7/DANKE5 codes, percentages-only rule), exact pre-press (148x210mm trim, 2mm bleed, CMYK, PDF/X-4), strict style rules (navy/purple, no gold/green), logo-handling rules.
picks.title: graphic designer / print designer to recreate a two-sided DIN A5 package
picks.desc: We need a professional graphic designer / print designer to recreate a two-sided DIN A5 package insert for Blausweta-Rasur. The current visual references are included in the asset package. Please do not simply upscale the AI drafts. The task is to rebuild the front and back side cleanly in Illustrator/InDesign as a proper print-ready layout with editable text, real vector logo, clean icons, correct bleed, and final PDF export for SAXOPRINT. Blausweta-Rasur is a German specialist retailer / online shop for shaving, grooming, razors, razor blades, care products and barber supplies. The shop serves private customers, barbers, salons and resellers. Blausweta-Rasur is already established on eBay and now wants to motivate marketplace customers to order directly in the official online shop. The insert should communicate: professional specialist retailer, reliable shipping, fair prices, direct shop advantages, loyalty/bonus points, referral benefits and shop-exclusive discount codes. Main goal: Customers who may know Blausweta from eBay or another marketplace should switch to the official online shop. Important campaign message: - Customers can save more directly in the Blausweta online shop. - First direct shop order after switching from eBay or another marketplace: 7% discount with code SHOP7. - Follow-up order / next direct shop order: 5% discount with code DANKE5. - Bonus points are collected additionally and can be redeemed. - Referral discounts are also available. Important: All discounts are percentages. Do not use € discount wording. Required deliverables: 1. Editable source file: Adobe Illustrator .ai preferred, or InDesign .indd with linked assets. 2. Print-ready two-sided PDF for SAXOPRINT, CMYK, PDF/X-4 preferred. 3. Front side and back side as separate high-resolution PNG/JPG previews. 4. All text must remain editable in the source file. 5. Use the official logo from the provided logo files. Do not trace/recreate the logo from the AI draft. 6. Use the clean warehouse header image without any baked-in logo. The logo will be positioned manually in the layout. Format / print setup: - DIN A5 flyer / package insert, double-sided, portrait orientation. - Final trim size: 148 × 210 mm. - Artwork size with bleed: 152 × 214 mm. - Bleed: 2 mm on every side. - Keep all important text/logos/icons at least 3 mm inside the final trim edge. Prefer 5 mm for safety. - Background images that touch the edge must extend into the bleed. - CMYK color mode. - Minimum image resolution: 250 dpi at final size, ideally 300 dpi. - Embed all fonts or convert to outlines in the print PDF. Design direction: Keep the style very close to the references: - Clean, modern, professional specialist retailer look. - White background with deep navy / purple accents. - No colorful mix. Stay in the Blausweta navy/purple world. - No gold, no green, no Trustpilot badge. - Avoid wedding/thank-you-card feeling. - Avoid playful hearts and handwritten romantic scripts. - The back side should feel like a professional shop benefit page. - The front side can remain warmer and personal, but still businesslike. Coupon details: SHOP7 = 7% welcome/switch discount for first direct shop order after switching from eBay or another platform. One-time use only. DANKE5 = 5% discount for the next direct shop order / follow-up order.
picks.task_type: Blausweta DIN A5 Package Insert — rebuild 2-sided print
picks.mcp_workflow: asset_add_file (logo files + clean warehouse header image + references) -> image_vectorize (icons if needed) -> search_design (Express A5 flyer template) -> fill_text (shop-benefit copy + codes SHOP7 / DANKE5) -> image_crop_and_resize (152x214mm w/ 2mm bleed) -> document_convert_pdf (CMYK PDF/X-4) -> asset_preview_file
inputs: Reference visuals (AI drafts — do NOT upscale) + official logo files (use as-is, don't trace)
Clean warehouse header image (no baked-in logo)
Copy: switch-to-shop benefits, codes SHOP7=7% first order, DANKE5=5% follow-up, bonus points, referral; percentages only
Style: white bg, navy/purple accents, no gold/green, businesslike (not wedding-y)
Format: DIN A5 portrait double-sided, trim 148x210mm, bleed 2mm (152x214), 300dpi, CMYK, PDF/X-4, fonts embedded/outlined
Separate hi-res front/back PNG/JPG previews + editable .ai/.indd source
picks.note: Client requires a clean from-scratch rebuild in Illustrator/InDesign with editable .ai/.indd source, real vector logo placement and precise pre-press (PDF/X-4) — connector can place the logo, set copy and export, but the bespoke two-sided print layout + native editable source must be finished by a human.

picks.why_strong: Double-sided 5x7 THC-beverage trade postcard with the ENTIRE copy deck verbatim in the brief (headlines, 90-year-low stat, business bullets, product sections), 9 named brand logos to place, 2 QR zones, bleed + crop marks.
picks.title: Double-Sided 5x7 THC Beverage Postcard Design
picks.desc: DESCRIPTION: Need a designer to create a clean, modern, premium double-sided 5x7 postcard (with bleed) for a THC beverage distribution company. Final file should be print-ready for professional printing. Looking for someone with experience designing for beverage, alcohol, cannabis, hospitality, nightlife, or restaurant brands. Please include relevant portfolio examples with your proposal. Assets, logos, and product photos will be provided. TIMELINE: * Initial concepts within 24–48 hours * Final files delivered within 3 days SIZE: * 5” x 7” * Double-sided * Include bleed + crop marks * Horizontal or vertical layout (designer recommendation welcome) DELIVERABLES: * Print-ready PDF * Editable Canva file GOAL: Create a premium handout for bars, restaurants, liquor stores, and on-premise accounts to promote THC beverages as a high-margin revenue stream. STYLE: * Beverage-forward, modern, premium * Bold and easy to scan quickly * NOT psychedelic, “stoner,” or smoke-shop style * Should feel similar to alcohol/hospitality marketing FRONT SIDE CONTENT: Headline: SERVE WHAT’S NEXT Subhead: Add a high-margin revenue stream with THC drinks. No alcohol. No hangover. 21+. Made with hemp - marijuana’s milder cousin - for a lighter, more buildable buzz. Stat: Alcohol consumption in the U.S. is at a 90-year low. Supporting line: Consumers still want social experiences - just different options. Business bullets: * High-margin pours * Repeat purchase behavior * Easy to add to existing menus QR Code Section: Scan for Product & Pricing Guide BACK SIDE CONTENT: Headline: A NEW KIND OF BUZZ Sections: * Spirit Bottles → for shots + cocktails (“Hightails”) * RTD Cans → ready-to-drink social beverages * THC Drops → turn any alcohol-free drink into a THC drink Additional points: * Delta-9 THC * Hemp-derived * Legal in Missouri --- This is a key point we need to get across*** * Social alternative to alcohol * Multiple mg/dose options available Brands/logos to include: * HiSide * Howdy * THC Social * Stay Cool * SUP * 8th Wonder * Tempters * CURRNT * Don’t Be That Dude QR CODE SECTION: WHAT’S THE BUZZ ABOUT? THC Drinks Explained - Scan to Watch. IMPORTANT: Need clean visual hierarchy, modern typography, product/lifestyle imagery, logo placement, and space for QR code.
picks.mcp_workflow: asset_add_file (company logo, 9 brand logos, product/lifestyle photos, 2 QR codes) -> search_design (Express 5x7 postcard template, 2-sided) -> fill_text (front + back copy as specified) -> image_crop_and_resize (5x7 + bleed) -> document_convert_pdf (print-ready w/ crop marks)
inputs: FRONT copy: headline 'SERVE WHAT'S NEXT', subhead, 90-year-low stat, 3 business bullets, 'Scan for Product & Pricing Guide' QR
BACK copy: 'A NEW KIND OF BUZZ', Spirit Bottles/RTD Cans/THC Drops sections, Delta-9/hemp/legal-in-MO points, social-alternative messaging, 'What's the Buzz About?' QR
Brand logos to place: HiSide, Howdy, THC Social, Stay Cool, SUP, 8th Wonder, Tempters, CURRNT, Don't Be That Dude
Distributor logo + product/lifestyle photos (client provides)
Two QR codes (client provides)
Size 5x7, double-sided, include bleed + crop marks; print-ready PDF + editable source
picks.note: All copy/assets are supplied so fill_text + a 2-sided 5x7 template + resize get to a print-ready PDF; premium hospitality-style visual hierarchy/typography and an editable Canva source file need a human finishing pass.

picks.why_strong: Meta retargeting campaign for TeenTalk parenting brand: 3 concepts x 3 formats = 9 finals, defined audience psychology (video-qualified warm mothers), brand palette, logo-stamp rule, mobile-first hierarchy, explicit anti-patterns.
picks.title: Meta Ads Designer Needed for 3 Parenting Retargeting Static Creatives
picks.desc: We are looking for a direct-response Meta ads designer to create 3 static retargeting ad creatives for TeenTalk, a parenting support system for parents of teens. These are not generic social media posts or cold ads. They are bridge creatives for a video-qualified audience — designed to move warm parents from recognition into our story-driven landing page. The audience has already watched 50%+ of our video ads. The goal is to move warm parents from recognition into action and bring them to the landing page with the right expectation. The creative should make the right parent feel: “This is about me, my teen, my pattern at home — and there may be a real way forward.” Target audience: - English-speaking mothers - Parents of a teen / preteen - Emotionally tired, relationship-driven, and aware there is a real problem at home - They do not want random parenting advice anymore - They are looking for a real system, not one more tip Final deliverables: - 3 static Meta ad creative concepts - Each concept delivered in 3 formats: 1) 9:16 — 1080×1920 — Stories / Reels 2) 4:5 — 1080×1350 — Feed 3) 1:1 — 1080×1080 — Square / flexible placements - Total: 9 exported final image files - Editable source files included if possible: Canva, Figma, Photoshop or Illustrator - Commercial-use / royalty-free visuals only - Clean, readable, mobile-first design - Small TeenTalk logo / purple round stamp in the top corner of each creative - 1 reasonable revision round included - If the final designs do not follow the approved brief, those issues should be corrected Design direction: - Clean, emotional, modern, readable - Serious, warm, credible — not cheesy - Use real emotional mother/teen imagery - Avoid overly staged “perfect family” images - Avoid childish design - Avoid generic therapy-clinic style - Avoid aggressive clickbait - Main text must be readable on mobile - Do not overload with too much text - Strong visual hierarchy: emotional visual, headline, short supporting line, CTA block, small TeenTalk mark Brand direction: Use a clean, premium, emotionally intelligent style. TeenTalk brand colors include soft teal / turquoise, purple, and warm yellow/gold CTA accents. The design should feel connected to a modern parent-support product, not like a generic parenting quote post. The full creative copy and detailed direction for all 3 ads will be provided after hiring. Budget: Up to $120 fixed price for 3 static creative concepts delivered in 3 formats each. To apply, please send: 1. 2–3 examples of Meta / Facebook / Instagram static ad creatives you designed 2. Confirmation that you can deliver 9:16, 4:5 and 1:1 versions 3. Confirmation that editable source files are included if possible 4. Your estimated delivery time 5. Please start your proposal with the word “TeenTalk” so I know you read the full brief
picks.task_type: Meta Retargeting Static Creatives — TeenTalk (3 concepts x3 sizes)
picks.mcp_workflow: asset_search (Adobe Stock emotional mother/teen imagery, royalty-free) -> asset_license_and_download_stock -> search_design (Express Meta ad template) -> fill_text (headline + supporting line + CTA) -> asset_add_file (TeenTalk purple round stamp) -> image_crop_and_resize (1080x1920, 1080x1350, 1080x1080) -> asset_preview_file
inputs: Creative copy + direction per ad (provided after hiring)
TeenTalk small purple round logo stamp (top corner)
Real emotional mother/teen imagery — royalty-free / Adobe Stock
Brand colours: soft teal/turquoise, purple, warm yellow/gold CTA
Budget up to \$120; 1 revision round
picks.note: Emotional photo selection comes from Adobe Stock; precise brand styling and mobile-first hierarchy across 9 files need a human's finishing pass. fill_text swaps copy only; exact brand font/colour/size, custom layout tweaks and on-brand styling need a human in Express.

picks.why_strong: Three coordinated tri-fold menus (Drinks / Wine / Cocktails) for The George Inn, Oundle — every section enumerated (11 drink categories, 8 wine, 6 cocktail), palette + traditional premium pub style, print-ready w/ bleed, consistent branding across all three.
picks.title: Tri-Fold Menu Design for Traditional Pub
picks.desc:
PROJECT: THE GEORGE INN OUNDLE – MENU DESIGN

I need a professional tri-fold (3-panel foldable) menu design created in Canva for The George Inn, Oundle.

The design should be fully editable in Canva so that we can easily update prices, add or remove products, and print new copies in the future without requiring further design work.

DELIVERABLES

1. Main Drinks Menu (Tri-Fold)
Draught Beer & Cider
Bottled Beer & Cider
Gin
Vodka
Rum
Whisky & Bourbon
Brandy & Cognac
Tequila, Shots & Liqueurs
Soft Drinks
Mixers
Juices

2. Wine List (Tri-Fold)
White Wines
Rosé Wines
Red Wines
Premium Wines
Sparkling Wines
Prosecco
Port
Wine by the Glass & Bottle Pricing

3. Cocktail Menu (Tri-Fold)

Signature Cocktails
Classic Cocktails
Spritz Selection
Mocktails
Premium Serves
Seasonal Specials

DESIGN REQUIREMENTS
 Use The George Inn Oundle logo provided.
Traditional premium British pub/gastro pub style.
Elegant and timeless design.
Suitable for table presentation and printing.
Consistent branding across all three menus.
Professional typography with clear pricing.
High readability.
Print-ready layout.
Include page margins and bleed considerations.
Canva editable source files must be supplied.
All fonts and elements used must be available within Canva.
Design should be easy to update in future.

COLOUR PALETTE
Traditional pub styling.
Cream/parchment background.
Dark green accents.
Black text.
Optional subtle gold highlights.

FILES REQUIRED
Canva editable link/file.
Print-ready PDF versions.
High-resolution PNG exports.

The final design should feel similar to a premium countryside pub, gastro pub, or boutique inn rather than a modern nightclub or chain restaurant.
picks.mcp_workflow: search_design (Express tri-fold menu template, traditional pub style) -> fill_text (drink categories + items + prices) -> asset_add_file (The George Inn logo) -> image_apply_color_overlay (cream/parchment + dark-green accents) -> asset_preview_file -> document_convert_pdf (print-ready, with bleed) [repeat for Drinks, Wine, Cocktail]
inputs: The George Inn Oundle logo (provided)
Full drink lists/prices for 3 tri-fold menus: Drinks (beer/cider/spirits/soft), Wine list, Cocktail menu
Palette: cream/parchment background, dark-green accents, black text, optional subtle gold; traditional premium British pub style
Outputs: print-ready PDF + high-res PNG; margins + bleed; consistent branding across all three
picks.note: Client explicitly wants editable Canva source files with fonts from Canva — the connector outputs rendered PDF/PNG, not an editable Canva/source file, and exact brand font/colour matching needs a human. fill_text is copy-only.

alternates.why: Full brand-collateral kit for a cleaning/care company: card, letterhead, email sig, 4 highlight icons, YouTube+Twitch banners, post+story templates, brand pattern, carousel — 12+ deliverables w/ exact px sizes.
alternates.title: Cleaning/Care Company Branding
alternates.desc: I have a logo for a cleaning/care company and need full branding done for it (logo attached). The deliverables are: Brand Identity & Assets: - Full Brand Guidelines (template will be provided) - Brand Pattern (1920 x 1280px) - Imagery (minimum 10 images) - High-resolution files (PNG, JPEG, PDF, SVG) & source files Print & Digital Design: - Double sided business card design (85 x 55mm) - Letterhead Design (A4) - Email Signature Design (600 x 100px) - x4 Instagram Highlight Icons (500 x 500px) - Social Media Banner (YouTube: 2560 x 1440px & Twitch: 1920 x 480) - x4 Custom Social Media Templates: 2 posts converted into stories (1350 x 1080px for post & 1080 x 1920px for story) Social Media: - Instagram carousel showcasing logo mockups/whole brand (1350 x 1080px) Unlimited Revisions

Connector fills the card/banner/social templates and resizes. fill_text swaps copy only; exact brand font/colour/size, custom layout tweaks and on-brand styling need a human in Express.

alternates.why: House of Umami ramen/sushi tri-fold REDESIGN (22.5x12in): we'd also generate the 'current menu' + change-doc as inputs — realistic edit-not-create job; heavy layout reflow.
alternates.title: Restaurant Menu Redesign
alternates.desc: Project Overview We are a ramen and sushi restaurant called House of Umami. We are updating our existing printed menu and need a professional designer to revise the layout while incorporating new menu items and pricing updates. The goal is not a full redesign, but rather an updated, clean version of our existing menu that fits additional items without feeling crowded, especially on the ramen section. Our current menu is a tri-fold printed menu (22.5” x 12” unfolded) used for dine-in customers. Scope of Work The designer will: Update our existing menu design Insert new menu items Remove discontinued items Update prices Adjust categories where needed Optimize the layout Ensure all content fits cleanly within the tri-fold format Improve readability and flow Avoid overcrowding (especially in the ramen section) Reorganize sections if necessary Current menu sections include: Small Plates Sushi Bowls Artisan Ramen Donburi Rice Bowls Sushi Rolls Nigiri / Sashimi Kids Desserts Solve the biggest layout challenge We are adding several ramen items and a Wagyu section. The designer should thoughtfully reorganize the ramen area so it remains clear and easy to read. Maintain our current brand style The current menu has: Dark background Food photography Red accent elements Japanese ramen/sushi aesthetic We want the same general vibe, but cleaner and more professional. Deliverables Final deliverables should include: • Print-ready PDF (CMYK, 300 DPI) • Editable source file (Adobe Illustrator or InDesign preferred) • Fonts and linked assets included • Correct bleed and margins for print Menu size: 22.5” x 12” unfolded tri-fold (this can be adjusted if needed to fit content) Files Provided We will provide: • Current menu PDF + AI file for current menu • Document outlining menu changes • Updated item descriptions and prices • Existing brand visuals What We’re Looking For Ideal candidates should have: • Experience designing restaurant menus • Strong typography and layout skills • Ability to organize large amounts of menu content clearly • Experience designing tri-fold or multi-panel menus Success Criteria The final menu should: • Fit all new content cleanly • Be easy for guests to scan and order from • Highlight ramen and signature items effectively • Maintain a premium, modern ramen-house aesthetic Timeline Looking to complete within 2-4 days after hiring. To Apply Please include: • 2–3 examples of restaurant menu designs you’ve created • Confirmation you can deliver editable files • Estimated turnaround time
alternates.mcp_workflow: asset_add_file (current menu PDF + AI file, change doc, updated copy, brand visuals) -> document_render_layout (export client AI/IDML to working proof) -> fill_text (insert new items, update prices, remove discontinued) -> asset_preview_file
inputs: Current menu PDF + Illustrator (.ai) source file (client provides)
Document of menu changes (additions: Wagyu section + new ramen items; removals; price updates)
Updated item descriptions & prices
Existing brand visuals (dark bg, food photography, red accents, Japanese aesthetic)
Trim size 22.5"x12" unfolded tri-fold; CMYK 300 DPI; correct bleed/margins
Deliverable: print-ready CMYK PDF + editable AI/INDD with fonts & linked assets
alternates.note: Connector can export/proof and swap copy on the client AI file, but the real ask is editorial reflow of a dense tri-fold (reorganise ramen, add Wagyu section without crowding) and packaging editable AI source with fonts — a human designer must do the layout reflow and pre-press.

alternates.why: KP7 pre-workout tub label (front+back): full hex palette, botanical motif, UK compliance text, dieline — overlaps category with existing 430 package.
alternates.title: Pre-Workout Supplement Label Designer — Dark, Premium, Clinical Aesthetic
alternates.desc: We're launching KP⁷ — a UK pre-workout supplement built around Kaempferia parviflora (black ginger) extract. One SKU. We need a front and back label designed for a black HDPE tub (~500ml, wide-mouth). Print-ready files plus a 3D mockup. A bottle design reference image is attached. This shows the correct tub shape, colourway, logo, and visual direction. The label must be consistent with this reference. Note: the copy on the reference image is not final — do not replicate the text, only the visual style and layout. THE AESTHETIC Dark, clinical, typographic. Not aggressive fitness. Not loud colours. Think premium nootropic or pharmaceutical — controlled, precise, serious. The attached reference shows the exact direction: black tub, white/purple type, botanical vascular motif in purple (#7F77DD). Colour palette: #1A0D24 (brand black), #7F77DD (purple accent), #C47A45 (muted orange), #7A8C5E (deep green), #D4C9A8 (dusty cream). Logo provided. Full ingredient list, UK compliance text, and nutrition table provided on hire. Full brand brief provided on hire. DELIVERABLES · Front label — print-ready AI + PDF, 300dpi · Back label — nutrition table, ingredients, UK food supplement compliance text, directions for use · 3D mockup on black HDPE tub — JPEG/PNG · All editable source files REQUIREMENTS You must have done this before. Show me supplement label work in your proposal — specifically anything dark, premium, or clinical in style. Generic fitness packaging will not be considered. State your fixed price in your application. Timeline: 7 days from brief handover.
alternates.task_type: Supplement Label — KP7 pre-workout, 500ml black HDPE tub
alternates.mcp_workflow: asset_add_file (reference image + logo) -> search_design (Express dark/clinical supplement-label template) -> fill_text (KP7, descriptor, ingredients, UK compliance text, directions) -> asset_add_file (logo + purple #7F77DD botanical accent on #1A0D24 black) -> asset_preview_file -> document_convert_pdf (print-ready front + back) -> asset_inline_preview (3D tub mockup)
inputs: Reference bottle image (tub shape, colourway, visual direction)
~500ml wide-mouth black HDPE tub dimensions + label dieline
Front + back label
Colour palette: #1A0D24 black, #7F77DD purple, #C47A45 orange, #7A8C5E green, #D4C9A8 cream
Logo (provided), full ingredient list + UK food-supplement compliance text + nutrition table (on hire)
Botanical vascular motif in purple per reference
alternates.note: Reference shows a bespoke botanical 'vascular motif' and precise typographic/clinical layout; fill_text only swaps copy and the connector can't draw that motif or match the exact type — a human finishes in Illustrator.

alternates.why: Amazon listing-image system (5-image stack per SKU) — great archetype but a 250-image volume contract; would need rescoping.
alternates.title: Amazon Listing Image Designer (AI Tools Allowed)
alternates.desc:
We are looking for an experienced Amazon Listing Image Designer to create high-converting Amazon listing images for our baby products brand.

Project Scope

* 50 SKUs to start
* 5 listing images per SKU
* Many SKUs are color variations of the same product, allowing designs to be adapted across variants.
* Potential for long-term collaboration with regular new product launches.

Deliverables (5 Images per SKU)

1. Main image
2. Feature & Benefits image
3. Lifestyle image
4. USP/Infographic image highlighting key product features
5. Size & Dimensions image showing accurate product measurements and dimensions

Requirements

* Experience creating Amazon listing images that improve click-through and conversion rates
* Strong understanding of Amazon image guidelines and best practices
* AI tools are allowed for creating lifestyle backgrounds, scenes, and supporting visuals, provided the final output is realistic, professional, and Amazon-ready
* Ability to maintain consistent branding across multiple products and color variants
* Good understanding of typography, infographics, and product-focused design

What We Will Provide

* Product images
* Product dimensions
* Key features
* Brand guidelines
alternates.task_type: Amazon Listing Images — 50 SKUs x 5 (baby products)
alternates.mcp_workflow: asset_add_file (product photos) -> image_remove_background -> change_background_color (white main) -> image_crop_and_resize -> search_design (Express infographic template) -> fill_text (features / size & dimensions) -> asset_copy_assets (reuse across colour variants) -> asset_preview_file
inputs: Product photos for 50 SKUs (many are colour variants — reuse layouts)
5 images/SKU: main, feature&benefits, lifestyle, USP/infographic, size&dimensions
Product dimensions + key features (provided)
Brand guidelines (provided)
250 images total; Amazon-compliant white main bg
Editable source (PSD/AI) requested — connector outputs flattened; confirm
alternates.note: Connector covers the white-background hero (image_remove_background) and the infographic/feature/size callouts via an Express template + fill_text; true 'lifestyle / product-in-use scene' composites and exact brand styling need a human (no scene generation here). Lifestyle backgrounds the client says AI may create are NOT generatable here.

alternates.why: Tour-package itinerary brochure (A4+Letter, interactive PDF) — rich inputs, slightly less specific brief.
alternates.title: Modern Tour Package PDF Design
alternates.desc:
I’m putting together a professionally-designed PDF that showcases one of our upcoming tour packages. The look I have in mind is modern, clean, and airy—white space, clear hierarchy, and visuals that immediately make a traveler want to keep reading.  

Content I will supply includes the full day-by-day itinerary, the pricing table with available payment schedules, a short set of travel tips and recommendations, a brief “About Us” overview, real customer testimonials, and our contact information. Your task is to weave all of this into a cohesive, on-brand document that is easy to skim on-screen yet still prints beautifully.

I’d like the final file delivered both as a high-resolution, print-ready PDF and as an editable source file (Adobe InDesign, Illustrator, or Canva are all fine). Please use licensing-safe fonts, align colors with our existing palette, and optimize any photos for quick download without sacrificing clarity.

Deliverables:
• Print-ready PDF (A4 and US Letter)  
• Interactive PDF (clickable links for email, phone, and web)  
• Editable source file in the design tool of your choice  

I’ll review for layout consistency, readability, and brand alignment before approving the final version.
alternates.task_type: Tour-Package Brochure / Itinerary PDF (A4 + US Letter)
alternates.mcp_workflow: search_design (Express travel brochure / itinerary template, modern airy white-space layout) -> fill_text (day-by-day itinerary, pricing/payment table, travel tips, About Us, testimonials, contact) -> asset_add_file (client tour photos) -> image_crop_and_resize (optimise photos) -> asset_preview_file -> document_convert_pdf (A4 & US Letter export)
inputs: Full day-by-day itinerary copy
Pricing table + available payment-schedule rows
Travel tips/recommendations, short About-Us blurb, customer testimonials, contact details (email/phone/web)
Client tour photography (high-res) to place and optimise
Brand palette/hex + licensing-safe fonts to match — confirm exact values
Outputs: print-ready PDF in A4 AND US Letter, plus interactive PDF with clickable email/phone/web links, plus editable source (InDesign/Illustrator/Canva)
alternates.note: Express template + fill_text handle copy/photos, but a multi-section magazine-style itinerary, the clickable interactive-PDF links, and exact brand font/colour matching need a human to finish in Express/InDesign.
